response.justification: The candidate is a skilled polyglot software developer with roughly 17 years of hands-on engineering experience, but the role requires a director-level individual contributor recognized for AI expertise and strategic advisory capability. The only AI-relevant work appears in the most recent two months (MCP tooling at re:cinq), with no prior depth in AI/ML research, product strategy, or customer-facing technical leadership at scale. The seniority, domain focus, and strategic impact expected for this principal-level AI strategy role are not evident in the resume.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering career spanning 17+ years, meeting the minimum experience threshold
Founder experience with GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and independent platform ownership
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq shows current awareness of the space
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (~2 months), with no demonstrated AI products, publications, or recognized thought leadership in the field
No evidence of director-level scope: strategic advisory to customers, cross-org AI roadmap ownership, or executive-level influence
Educational background (BS Computer Science, BA Fine Arts) does not include the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and no equivalent research output compensates
